# useLockInterval

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether the keychain automatically locks after a certain period of time.

## Declaration

```swift
var useLockInterval: DarwinBoolean
```

## Discussion

Use [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSettings/lockInterval] to indicate the time in seconds after which the keychain should automatically be locked.
title: useLockInterval
